# cloudflare_zero_trust_dex_rule (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_zero_trust_dex_rule" "example_zero_trust_dex_rule" {
  account_id = "01a7362d577a6c3019a474fd6f485823"
  rule_id = "f174e90a-fafe-4643-bbbc-4a0ed4fc8415"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `rule_id` (String) API Resource UUID tag.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) API Resource UUID tag.
- `match` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `targeted_tests` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--targeted_tests))
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--targeted_tests"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targeted_tests`

Read-Only:

- `data` (Attributes) The configuration object which contains the details for the WARP client to conduct the test. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--targeted_tests--data))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `test_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--targeted_tests--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targeted_tests.data`

Read-Only:

- `host` (String) The desired endpoint to test.
- `kind` (String) The type of test.
Available values: "http", "traceroute".
- `method` (String) The HTTP request method type.
Available values: "GET".
